title: eleocharis congesta subsp. subvivipara
intro: Eleocharis congesta subsp. subvivipara, also known as the Australian Spikerush, is a type of sedge plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eleocharis congesta subsp. subvivipara include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion to create teas and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
